deploy.startCommand: sh -c "python manage.py migrate && python manage.py shell -c \"from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; import os; User = get_user_model(); username = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_USERNAME'); email = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL'); password = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD'); User.objects.filter(username=username).exists() or User.objects.create_superuser(username=username, email=email, password=password)\" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && gunicorn speedlogger_project.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} --access-logfile - --error-logfile - --timeout 120"
